MINI MINUTES:
Debra Sabo Whisenhunt, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf. At the oral request of self-represented plaintiff, the Court ordered that the sanctions issued on JUN-06-2018 be vacated. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to NOV-27-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2018 Continued To Jul-24-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to JUL-24-2018 at 10:30 am in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
